surface.name: Self Client client-credentials access token via cURL
surface.selection_basis: The Self Client flow produces a server-to-server access token with a direct cURL request and no SDK.

alternatives_considered.name: Authorization code flow
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: It adds browser consent and redirect handling; Self Client client credentials is the documented server-to-server route requested here.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Zoho Self Client and obtain the first OAuth access token using client credentials.
assumed_prior_state: The developer begins before account creation with no platform resources or credentials.
A supported browser and internet connection are available.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Zoho validates the Self Client credentials and returns an OAuth access token.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The token endpoint returns JSON containing access_token, api_domain, token_type, and expires_in values.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The token endpoint returns JSON containing access_token, api_domain, token_type, and expires_in values.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This is the first observable end-to-end result on the selected official surface; later production configuration and expansion follow it.

prerequisites.requirement: A Zoho account with access to the API Console and target organization.
A Self Client client ID and client secret.
Valid scopes and organization identifier for the target Zoho service.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to Zoho and open the API Console.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Register a Self Client and choose the client-credentials flow.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Copy the client ID and client secret and identify the required scope and organization ID.
primary_path.output: All token request values are available.
primary_path.success_signal: All token request values are available.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Use cURL to POST the documented client_credentials token request to the correct Zoho accounts domain.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Confirm the response includes an access token and expiry metadata.
primary_path.output: A usable OAuth access token is present.
primary_path.success_signal: A usable OAuth access token is present.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

friction_gates.description: The requested scopes and organization ID must be valid for the target Zoho service.
The token request requires the Self Client ID and secret.

sources.title: Client Credentials Flow for Self Client

uncertainties.question: The required organization parameter and available scopes vary among Zoho products and data centers.
uncertainties.impact: The exact number or ordering of required onboarding actions may vary for a fresh account.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Public official documentation does not fully expose every authenticated or account-dependent state.

excluded_after_success: Production hardening, scale configuration, and ongoing operations after the first successful result.
